result.stdout:
Description:
  Example of AtriusDigitalTwins CLient SDK (C#) usage

Usage:
  Atrius.DigitalTwins.Api.Client.Example [options]

Options:
  -s, --server <server>                           URL of the Atrius Digital Twins API [default: http://localhost:5143/]
  -i, --interactive                               If true, do interactive (browser) authentication [default: False]
  --scope, --visibility-scope <visibility-scope>  Visibility Scope Id to use. Note that AdminScope ID is 18f5abff-3082-4284-8886-f07fd990accf []
  --version                                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                  Show help and usage information
